title: the-loop collaborators
description: Schema for .the-loop/collaborators.yaml — the stewards of the repository (CODEOWNERS-like) and the SINGLE source of truth for who collaborates on this project and how they are notified (issue-82, decision-035). Every recipient of a harness-raised notification is resolved from this file by role; the harness config (harness-config.yaml) references roles, never people. The CLI daemon never reads this file (decision-032/decision-035): the operator declares their own recipients, with this same collaborator structure, in cli-config.yaml.

notificationChannel.description: One communication channel a collaborator can be notified on. Notification-only: the decision itself always lands as a ticket/PR comment (the paper trail).

type.description: Channel type. Only slack is supported for now; the enum grows as more types ship.

enabled.description: Per-channel switch — a disabled channel is never used even when the collaborator's notifications are enabled.

via.description: How the harness interacts with the channel — the same primitives as externalTools.kind. E.g. slack via a Slack MCP server (mcp), the slack CLI (cli), or a webhook/Web API call (api).

config.description: Channel-type-specific configuration. For type: slack the only key is channel-list.

channel-list.description: [slack] Slack channels to notify, e.g. ["#the-loop", "#eng-alerts"]. Empty = the channel entry is declared but routes nowhere yet.

collaborator.description: One collaborator: an individual or a group, the roles they hold, and how to notify them. Reused verbatim by cli-config.yaml's operator-declared collaborators (same structure, declared not looked up).

handle.description: GitHub handle or group, e.g. @octocat or @org/team.

roles.description: Roles this collaborator holds. Notification event filters (harness-config.yaml notifications.events / cli-config.yaml notifications.events) target roles; recipients are resolved from this list.

notifications.description: How this collaborator is notified. Absent = no notifications for them (equivalent to enabled: false).

enabled.description: Per-user master switch — false silences every channel below.

version.description: Schema version of this file. Used by /upgrade-the-loop to reconcile.

collaborators.description: The complete list of collaborators for this project, defined up-front. RULE: every decision needs a paper trail, so at least one collaborator must hold the approver role.
